title: briza media var. pilosa
intro: Briza media var. pilosa, also known as the lesser quaking grass or quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Briza media var. pilosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Briza media var. pilosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
